data.title: Aurora Summer Campaign
data.excerpt: A multi-channel marketing campaign that redefined Aurora's summer collection launch with immersive digital storytelling and bold art direction.
data.description:
Aurora Fashion wanted their SS24 collection to feel like an event, not just a product drop. The brief was ambitious: create a campaign universe that bridges editorial fashion photography, social-first video content, and an interactive digital lookbook — all unified under one creative concept.

We developed "Golden Hour" — a campaign built around the idea that Aurora's pieces are designed for the most luminous moments of the day. Every visual was shot during actual golden hour across three locations: a rooftop in Barcelona, a coastal cliff in Portugal, and a greenhouse in Copenhagen. The colour grading, typography, and motion design all echo that warm, fleeting glow.

The results exceeded every KPI. The interactive lookbook saw 4.2 minutes average session time — triple the industry benchmark. Social engagement increased 187% compared to the previous season, and the collection sold through 40% faster than any prior launch. Vogue Business featured the campaign as a case study in digital-first fashion marketing.
